mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Logs ( user_id, operation_type, target_id, target_name, target_type, description, status, request_method, request_path, ip_address, user_agent, execution_time, error_message, timestamp, is_deleted, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{operationType}, #{targetId}, #{targetName}, #{targetType}, #{description}, #{status}, #{requestMethod}, #{requestPath}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent}, #{executionTime}, #{errorMessage}, #{timestamp}, #{isDeleted}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select:
SELECT log_id as logId, user_id as userId, operation_type as operationType, target_id as targetId, target_name as targetName, target_type as targetType, description, status, request_method as requestMethod, request_path as requestPath, ip_address as ipAddress, user_agent as userAgent, execution_time as executionTime, error_message as errorMessage, timestamp, is_deleted as isDeleted, created_at as createdAt, deleted_at as deletedAt FROM Logs WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT log_id as logId, user_id as userId, operation_type as operationType, target_id as targetId, target_name as targetName, target_type as targetType, description, status, request_method as requestMethod, request_path as requestPath, ip_address as ipAddress, user_agent as userAgent, execution_time as executionTime, error_message as errorMessage, timestamp, is_deleted as isDeleted, created_at as createdAt, deleted_at as deletedAt FROM Logs WHERE is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT #{limit}
